name: CROSS_YEARLY_TREND_BY_TARGETPAIR_RANGE
description: Yearly trend by target pair in a year range.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= $start_year AND y.year <= $end_year
RETURN y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY year ASC
LIMIT 50;

examples: 某target pair在2023-2025的年度趋势如何？
